MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SHARMA, ARUN AS TO DEFENDANT GROWTH AND LEARNING OPPORTUNITIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHARMA, ARUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GROWTH AND LEARNING OPPORTUNITIES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
